untranslatable_reason: Signal requires direct access to CFTC Commercial Hedger positioning data (net long/short percentile), which is not available in the allowed indicators list. Price_pos_20 (20-bar price position) is used as a proxy but does not capture actual hedger flows or their counter-directional relationship to price. The signal's core logic—hedger positioning preceding or accompanying directional moves—cannot be fully translated without explicit hedger position indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using price_pos_20 to simulate positioning percentile thresholds (55th percentile ≈ 0.55, mean reversion ≈ 0.50), but this is a significant deviation from the original intent. The signal fundamentally relies on CFTC data interpretation and supply-demand flow analysis that extends beyond price-action indicators. Recommend incorporating a dedicated hedger positioning data feed or using returns/volume divergence as an alternative proxy.
